response.justification: While Bogdan is a talented software craftsman with strong fundamentals in testing, architecture, and distributed systems, he falls significantly short on the core technical requirements. He has only ~6 months of documented C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) versus the required 8 years, and his entire professional history is primarily full-stack web and backend development. The role demands deep C++ and cloud compute infrastructure expertise, which are not evident in his background.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with demonstrated expertise in TDD, CI/CD, and architectural design across multiple senior roles
Experience building high-performance distributed systems at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second with optimization in caching and async I/O
Community engagement and teaching ability evidenced through workshops, conference talks, and sustained open-source project maintenance
concerns: Critical gap: Only ~6 months of primary C++ experience versus required 8 years; recent work exclusively in JavaScript/TypeScript and web stack
Missing cloud infrastructure specialization—background is full-stack web development with only superficial cloud exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) not aligned with compute platform focus
No explicit technical leadership experience mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers; senior titles reflect individual contributor seniority rather than mentoring-focused leadership
